text:
On Wed, 13 Oct 1999 handy@physics.montana.edu wrote:

> >Description:
> wmMatrix perhaps qualifies as my Most Pointless Port to date (closely
> edging bclock out for this distinction).  Runs a 'matrix' looking thingy
> in a tinny windowmaker dock app window.  I'm not aware that it does 
> anything else.

> # This is a shell archive (produced by GNU sharutils 4.2).
> # To extract the files from this archive, save it to some FILE, remove
> # everything before the `!/bin/sh' line above, then type `sh FILE'.

It also qualifies for Most Bloated Shar Recieved by FreeBSD.org
